title: Anti-Harassment Policy
description: Workplace anti-harassment policy detailing definitions of sexual and non-sexual harassment, and investigation rules.
whatsCovered: Definition of hostile work environments and sexual harassment
Online harassment guidelines (Slack, Zoom, email rules)
whenToUse: Use this policy during employee onboarding to define and prohibit sexual and verbal harassment in the office or remote channels.

fields.label: Company Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovation Way, San Francisco, CA

clauses.heading: ANTI-HARASSMENT POLICY
clauses.body: This corporate document (the "Agreement" or "Acknowledgment") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and {employee_name}, residing at {employee_address} ("Employee" or "Applicant").

clauses.heading: 1. Scope & Acknowledgment
clauses.body: This document establishes compliance policies, compensation, onboarding, or offboarding parameters for Anti-Harassment Policy. Employee agrees to review the policies and adhere to the guidelines set out herein.

clauses.heading: 2. Harassment Incident Reviews
clauses.body: Workplace harassment is prohibited. Company shall complete investigations of reports within {investigation_days} business days.

clauses.heading: Compliance & Dispute Resolution
clauses.body: Any disputes regarding this policy, benefit calculation, or onboarding agreement shall be resolved through the Company's internal HR procedures or under the laws of the governing jurisdiction.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Is this agreement template binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by both the employee and authorized company representative, it becomes part of the employment record and is contractually binding.

faq.question: Can I customize this template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add custom annexes or clauses using the online editor to match your local state requirements.
